prestazioni: Engine swap to a Toyota 1NZ-FE (1.5L) with a custom turbo kit featuring a Garrett GT2560R turbocharger, HKS Hi-Power exhaust manifold, and GReddy intercooler. ECU reflash via Haltech Elite 1500 with custom mapping for 220 HP at 7,000 RPM on 98 RON fuel, paired with a 6-speed manual transmission from a Daihatsu Copen (L880K) with a Cusco Type-RS limited-slip differential.

Suspension overhaul using Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valved for the J100 chassis), polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF0115K), and a Whiteline front sway bar (22mm adjustable) to reduce body roll. Braking upgraded to Endless CC-R6 rotors (280mm front, 260mm rear) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and stainless steel braided lines from Goodridge.

Forced induction supporting mods: Tomei 260° camshafts (intake/exhaust), HKS Super Power Flow air filter, and a custom 3-inch turbo-back exhaust system with a Fujitsubo Giken single-exit muffler. Fuel system upgraded with Walbro 255 LPH fuel pump, Injector Dynamics ID1000 injectors, and a Sard fuel pressure regulator for consistent boost delivery.
estetica: Custom Rocket Bunny-inspired widebody kit (J100-specific) with carbon fiber overfenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser from Varis Japan. Front bumper replaced with a Seibon Carbon fiber unit featuring integrated LED fog lights and a custom mesh grille.

OEM+ interior with Recaro SRD-E bucket seats (J100-specific mounts), Takata Drift III 4-point harnesses, and a custom roll cage from AutoPower Industries (bolt-in, 6-point). Steering wheel replaced with a Nardi Classic 350mm suede wheel on a NRG quick-release hub, paired with a custom gauge pod housing Defi BF gauges (boost, oil pressure, water temp).

Exterior accents: JDM-spec Toyota Vitz RS side mirrors (color-matched), custom LED taillights with sequential turn signals (inspired by the Toyota 86), and a custom vinyl wrap in 3M Gloss Flip Psychedelic (color-shifting) with matte black roof and pillars. Wheels: Work Emotion CR Kiwami (16x8 +25 offset) with Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R tires (215/45/16).
